info.title: DirectIt API
info.description: Information on using the endpoints can be found here:

trackingNumber.description: Tracking Number for users to track their package

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url https://api.directx.ca/order \
  --header 'accept: text/plain' \
  --header 'content-type: application/*+json' \
  --data '{"account": "1111","shipAddressID": 1111,"conAddressID": 1111,"del_inst": "Leave at door","cust_ref": "John Doe","checkedEmail": true,"deliveryEmail": "johndoe@example.com","rate": {"baseRate": 3,"ser_time": 10,"ser_area": "S","dtdct": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z","dtCallIn": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"},"email": "user@example.com","pieces": 0,"weight": 0,"packageType": "Envelope","caller": "string","additionalEmail": "user@example.com","returnTripServic": {"baseRate": 0,"ser_time": 0,"dtdct": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"}}'

import requests

url = "https://api.directx.ca/order"

payload = "{\"account\": \"1111\",\"shipAddressID\": 1111,\"conAddressID\": 1111,\"del_inst\": \"Leave at door\",\"cust_ref\": \"John Doe\",\"checkedEmail\": true,\"deliveryEmail\": \"johndoe@example.com\",\"rate\": {\"baseRate\": 3,\"ser_time\": 10,\"ser_area\": \"S\",\"dtdct\": \"2019-08-24T14:15:22Z\",\"dtCallIn\": \"2019-08-24T14:15:22Z\"},\"email\": \"user@example.com\",\"pieces\": 0,\"weight\": 0,\"packageType\": \"Envelope\",\"caller\": \"string\",\"additionalEmail\": \"user@example.com\",\"returnTripServic\": {\"baseRate\": 0,\"ser_time\": 0,\"dtdct\": \"2019-08-24T14:15:22Z\"}}"
headers = {
    'accept': "text/plain",
    'content-type': "application/*+json

get.description: Get order by account ID and job ID

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url https://api.directx.ca/order/1000/12345

import requests

url = "https://api.directx.ca/order/1000/12345"

response = requests.request("GET", url)

print(response.text)
